title: [spec-compliance] RPL incomplete MUST checks for Non-Storing Mode
description: rust/lichen-rpl/src/* and zephyr lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/* miss full RFC2119 checks for Non-Storing Mode, Trickle params, MRHOF, DAO per draft-lichen-rpl-lora-00.md and spec/05-routing.md. Replay and S=1 incomplete. See project-LICHEN-s3t5
